title: 1195 Conductive Ink as Thermal Paste - 6 Months On
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
Don't forget that you can buy the ink and my books and other materials for your own experiments  at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/    - and for the many who have asked, yes, you can also donate to further our work, again through the shop.
